mapper.sql: select item_id, bill_id, goods_id, goods_name, goods_model, weight, allocated_weight, unit_price, amount, sort_order, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from logistics_bill_item
mapper.select: where bill_id = #{billId} and del_flag = '0' order by sort_order asc, item_id asc

select i.item_id, i.bill_id, i.goods_id, i.goods_name, i.goods_model, i.weight, i.allocated_weight, i.unit_price, i.amount, i.sort_order, i.del_flag, i.create_by, i.create_time, i.update_by, i.update_time, i.remark from logistics_bill_item i inner join logistics_bill b on i.bill_id = b.bill_id where i.del_flag = '0' and b.del_flag = '0' and i.allocated_weight < i.weight and b.bill_status in ('pending', 'partial') order by b.priority desc, b.bill_date asc, i.bill_id asc, i.sort_order asc
mapper.insert:
insert into logistics_bill_item
bill_id, goods_id, goods_name, goods_model, weight, allocated_weight, unit_price, amount, sort_order, del_flag, create_by, remark, create_time
#{billId}, #{goodsId}, #{goodsName}, #{goodsModel}, #{weight}, #{allocatedWeight}, #{unitPrice}, #{amount}, #{sortOrder}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate()

insert into logistics_bill_item (bill_id, goods_id, goods_name, goods_model, weight, allocated_weight, unit_price, amount, sort_order, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.billId}, #{item.goodsId}, #{item.goodsName}, #{item.goodsModel}, #{item.weight}, #{item.allocatedWeight}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.amount}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update logistics_bill_item set del_flag = '2' where bill_id = #{billId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select ifnull(sum(allocated_weight), 0) from logistics_bill_item where bill_id = #{billId} and del_flag = '0'
